idea.hook: You feel completely still right now, don't you?
facts: Earth's rotation makes you spin at ~1,670 km/h (~1,037 mph) at the equator.
Our planet then orbits the Sun at an astonishing ~107,000 km/h (~67,000 mph).
And the entire Solar System hurtles through the Milky Way at ~828,000 km/h (~514,000 mph)!
idea.payoff: You're a cosmic speed demon, constantly traveling billions of miles through space without even feeling it!
idea.title: You're Moving How FAST?! 🤯🚀

scenes.text: You feel completely still right now, don't you?
scenes.visual: A calm, dark space background with subtle distant stars. Focus is on the text.

scenes.text: You spin with Earth at ~1,670 km/h!
scenes.visual: A detailed 3D model of Earth slowly rotating, filling the upper portion of the screen.

scenes.text: Earth orbits the Sun at ~107,000 km/h!
scenes.visual: A stylized animation showing Earth orbiting the Sun from a slightly tilted perspective. Orbit path visible.

scenes.text: Our Solar System hurtles at ~828,000 km/h!
scenes.visual: The Solar System (Sun and orbiting planets) depicted as a single unit moving rapidly through a starry field, implying motion through the galaxy.

scenes.text: You're a cosmic speed demon, traveling billions of miles without even feeling it!
scenes.visual: A dynamic, abstract cosmic background with streaks of light, giving a strong sense of speed and vastness. The text is prominent.
